modules.name: dohc-viewer
build-commands: data_archive="$(find deb-extract -maxdepth 1 -type f -name 'data.tar.*' -print -quit)"; test -n "$data_archive"; mkdir -p deb-extract/data; tar -xf "$data_archive" -C deb-extract/data

resource_dir="$(find deb-extract/data/usr/lib -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d -print -quit)"; test -n "$resource_dir"; test -f "$resource_dir/ffmpeg-manifest.json"; mkdir -p /app/lib; cp -a "$resource_dir" /app/lib/

desktop="$(find deb-extract/data/usr/share/applications -maxdepth 1 -type f -name '*.desktop' -print -quit)"; test -n "$desktop"; sed -i 's/^Icon=.*/Icon=com.dohc.viewer/' "$desktop"; install -Dm644 "$desktop" /app/share/applications/com.dohc.viewer.desktop

icon_root=deb-extract/data/usr/share/icons/hicolor; test -d "$icon_root"; test -n "$(find "$icon_root" -type f -name '*.png' -print -quit)"; find "$icon_root" -type f -name '*.png' | while IFS= read -r icon; do relative="${icon#"$icon_root"/}"; size="${relative%%/*}"; install -Dm644 "$icon" "/app/share/icons/hicolor/$size/apps/com.dohc.viewer.png"; done
